title: Patient Care Technician
description: Provide direct nursing assistance to patients on med-surg unit at John Peter Smith Hospital. Take vitals, assist nurses, document EHR entries. CNA preferred, BLS required. Day and evening shifts. Pay: $17.50/hr. Fair-chance employer; hospital security clearance still required. Hospital ward, full-time.

title: Registered Nurse - Med Surg
description: RN for medical-surgical unit, JPS Hospital. BSN preferred, BLS and ACLS required. Manage patient assignments, IV therapy, EHR (Epic) charting. Day shift, 12-hour rotations. Pay: $34.00/hr. Hospital. Background check post-offer.

title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
description: CNA on long-term care unit. Provide direct patient care, vitals, assist with ADLs. CNA cert required. Pay: $16.00/hr. Day shift. Healthcare hospital environment. Background check post-offer.

title: Pharmacy Technician
description: Pediatric hospital pharmacy. Fill prescriptions, sterile compounding under IV hood, inventory. Pharmacy Tech license required. Pay: $19.00/hr. Hospital. Day shift. Background check.

title: Phlebotomist
description: Outpatient lab phlebotomy. Draw blood, label samples, EHR entry. Phlebotomy certification required. Pay: $16.50/hr. Day shift. Hospital outpatient clinic.

title: Medical Assistant
description: Front and back office MA. Vitals, EHR (Epic), patient intake, sterilize instruments. MA cert + BLS required. Pay: $17.00/hr. Healthcare clinic, day shift.

title: Hospital Food Service Worker
description: Cafeteria and patient meal prep at John Peter Smith Hospital. Day and evening shifts. Uniforms provided. Second-chance hiring program. Pay: $13.50/hr. Healthcare environment.

title: Home Health Aide
description: In-home patient care across Tarrant County. ADLs, light housekeeping, meal prep. CNA preferred. Mileage reimbursed. Pay: $15.00/hr. Day shift. Caregiver role.

title: Dietary Aide
description: Tray assembly and patient dietary delivery. Health-care food handling, ServSafe certification a plus. Pay: $13.00/hr. Day and evening shifts. Hospital.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Pick, pack, and ship at the AllianceTexas distribution hub. Forklift certification provided. Multiple shifts including overnight. Pay: $18.00/hr. Background-friendly.

title: Forklift Operator
description: Reach truck, sit-down forklift operator at AllianceTexas warehouse. OSHA-10 a plus. Forklift certified preferred. Pay: $19.50/hr. Day and night shifts available. Industrial warehouse.

title: Picker / Packer
description: Sort and pack packages at the Amazon Air Hub. Picker, packer, stocker roles. Pay: $17.50/hr. Day and overnight shifts. Background check post-offer.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Sort, price, and stock donated goods. Operate pallet jacks. Full-time with benefits after 90 days. Pay: $14.00/hr. Fair-chance hiring core to mission.

title: Yard Helper
description: Couple and uncouple rail cars, throw switches, and maintain yard safety at the BNSF intermodal facility. Outdoor work, all weather. Pay: $26.00/hr. Background-friendly second-chance program. CDL not required.

title: Package Handler
description: Load and unload trailers, scan packages, sort by zone. Multiple shifts including 4am sunrise sort. Pay: $17.00/hr. Forklift cert provided. Background check.

title: Inventory Specialist
description: Inventory tracking, cycle counts, pallet jack operation at UPS distribution center. Forklift cert preferred. Pay: $18.50/hr. Day shift, Monday-Friday.

title: Construction Apprentice
description: Entry-level apprenticeship on commercial build sites across DFW. Learn carpentry, concrete, and site safety. OSHA-10 within 30 days. Tools provided. Pay: $19.00/hr. Reentry-friendly employer. Construction labor.

title: General Laborer
description: Site cleanup, material handling, and demolition support across DFW commercial projects. Tools and PPE provided. Pay: $17.00/hr. Construction. Fair-chance hiring partner.

title: Welder
description: MIG and TIG welding on rotorcraft components. AS9100 environment. OSHA-30 preferred. Pay: $24.50/hr. Welding, manufacturing. Day and second shift.

title: Electrician Apprentice
description: Electrical apprenticeship on commercial construction. Day class, evening field work. Pay: $18.50/hr starting, scheduled raises. OSHA-10 within first month.

title: Plumber Apprentice
description: Plumbing and pipefitting apprenticeship across DFW commercial projects. Earn while you learn. Pay: $18.00/hr starting. Construction trade.

title: HVAC Apprentice
description: Commercial HVAC service and install. Hands-on training, EPA 608 cert provided. Pay: $19.00/hr. Construction trade. Day shift, with on-call rotation.

title: Carpenter
description: Commercial framing carpenter. Read blueprints, frame walls, install doors. OSHA-30 required within 60 days. Pay: $22.00/hr. Construction.

title: Concrete Laborer
description: Concrete formwork, pouring, and finishing on highway and bridge projects. Heavy lifting. Pay: $18.00/hr. Construction. Outdoor, all weather.

title: Production Technician

title: Production Assembly Worker
description: Assembly line work on F-35 fighter program. Repetitive standing, hand tool use, light lifting. Quality control. Rotating shifts. Pay: $22.00/hr. Manufacturing. Background-check-friendly for non-classified roles.

title: Aircraft Assembler
description: Helicopter assembly. Read blueprints, install components, torque to spec. AS9100 quality system. Pay: $21.50/hr. Manufacturing. Day shift.

title: Machine Operator
description: CNC machine operator on aerospace components. Read GD&T, perform first-article inspection. Pay: $20.00/hr. Manufacturing. Second shift premium.

title: Quality Control Inspector
description: Final-line QC on Class 8 trucks. Visual inspection, measurement, documentation. Pay: $19.50/hr. Manufacturing. Day shift.

title: Cook
description: Grill and prep cook at high-volume Whataburger location. ServSafe a plus. Pay: $14.50/hr. Day and evening shifts. Restaurant fast food, kitchen.

description: Country club server, evening events. Restaurant front-of-house. Tips averaging $200/shift. Pay: $11.00/hr + tips. Hospitality.

description: Dish room and kitchen sanitation at Naval Air Station Joint Reserve Base. Day and evening shifts. Pay: $13.50/hr. Background check required (base access); fair-chance friendly for many records. Restaurant kitchen.

description: Prep cook for institutional catering kitchen. ServSafe required within 30 days. Pay: $15.50/hr. Kitchen. Day shift, Monday-Friday.

description: Hotel banquet server, evening events and weddings. Hospitality, restaurant. Pay: $12.00/hr + service charge. Evening and weekend shifts.

title: Barista
description: Independent coffee shop barista. Espresso, pour-overs, customer service. ServSafe a plus. Pay: $13.00/hr + tips. Daytime, Tue-Sun.

description: Service and repair Trinity Metro buses and TEXRail vehicles. CDL training provided to qualifying candidates. Public-sector benefits package. Pay: $24.00/hr. Mechanic. Manufacturing maintenance. Fair-chance friendly.

title: Bus Operator
description: Trinity Metro bus driver. CDL-B with passenger endorsement (CDL training provided). Pay: $20.00/hr. Transportation, driver. Day and evening shifts. Fair-chance friendly.

description: Detention officer at Tarrant County Jail. State certification provided after hire. Pay: $22.00/hr. Government, day and night shifts. Background check post-offer.

description: Field code compliance inspector. Government civil service. Pay: $20.50/hr. Day shift. Drive city vehicle (CDL not required).

description: School custodian, evening shift. Public sector benefits. Pay: $13.00/hr. Government. Custodian / janitor. Background check required.

description: TCC campus custodian. Day and evening shifts. Public sector benefits. Pay: $13.50/hr. Custodian. Government.

title: Teaching Assistant - Special Education
description: Special education classroom paraprofessional. Associate degree or 48 college hours preferred. Pay: $15.00/hr. Government, education. Day shift.

description: Inbound call center, brokerage customer service. Series 7 sponsored after hire. Pay: $20.00/hr base + bonus. Day shift. Office, customer service. Credit check required.

description: Inbound customer service for residential customers. Pay: $16.50/hr + monthly bonus. Day and evening shifts. Customer service.

description: Temp-to-hire placements at Tarrant County manufacturers and warehouses. Same-day onboarding. Reentry navigators on site. Multiple shifts. Pay: $14-18/hr depending on role. Manufacturing, warehouse.

description: Hospital and commercial site security. State security cert provided. Pay: $15.50/hr. Day, evening, overnight shifts. Security guard.

description: Hotel housekeeper. Clean guest rooms, restock supplies. Pay: $14.00/hr. Day shift. Hospitality.

description: OTR or regional CDL-A driver. Class A CDL required. Pay: $0.55/mile. Driver. Sign-on bonus $5,000. Background check required.

description: Local route delivery driver. CDL-B with airbrake. Pay: $25.00/hr. Day shift. Driver, delivery, transportation.

description: Distribution center stocker, picker, packer. Forklift cert provided. Pay: $19.00/hr. Day, evening, overnight shifts. Warehouse.

description: Retail sales associate, hardware department. Customer service, product knowledge, light lifting. Pay: $15.50/hr. Day and evening shifts. Retail customer service.

description: Grocery store cashier. Customer service, cash handling, light lifting. Pay: $14.00/hr. Day and evening shifts. Retail.

description: Cosmetics manufacturing line operator. GMP environment. Manufacturing, assembly, machine operator. Pay: $19.00/hr. Rotating shifts.

description: Commercial janitor on rotating downtown buildings. Evening shift 6pm-2am. Pay: $13.50/hr. Custodian, janitor.

description: Mental health clinic receptionist. Front desk, scheduling, EHR data entry. Pay: $15.00/hr. Day shift. Office customer service. Mental health environment.

description: Retail pharmacy technician. Texas Pharmacy Technician registration required. Pay: $18.00/hr. Day and evening shifts. Healthcare retail.
